description: Create the packages/quant-economy package with complete monetization infrastructure: (1) Quant Coins virtual currency with wallet model, balance, buy-coins flow via Razorpay/UPI + Stripe adapter interfaces, earn-coins mechanisms (daily login, referrals), and transaction ledger with idempotency. (2) Virtual goods catalog + store with avatar items/outfits/skins, chat themes/stickers/gifts, and cross-app inventory. (3) Creator economy with item/game-pass listings, 70/30 revenue split, payout ledger, cash-out request flow. (4) Self-boost engine where users pay coins/money to amplify their own post/reel (NO sponsored tag, organic reach multiplier), tiered boost packs, boost analytics. (5) Company ads - separate CPM/CPC ad campaigns with a clear sponsored label, budget, targeting, impression/click tracking. (6) Gifting + tipping system. (7) Subscriptions - Free/Pro/Pro+/Family tiers with entitlement checks. Plus 40+ vitest tests covering wallet ledger integrity, revenue split math, boost vs ad separation, entitlement gating.
steps: Create packages/quant-economy/package.json with name @quant/quant-economy, type: module, dependencies on zod ^3.24.2, devDeps on vitest ^2, typescript ~5.5.0, @types/node ^22. Scripts: build (tsc), typecheck (tsc --noEmit), test (vitest run), lint (eslint .)

Create packages/quant-economy/tsconfig.json extending pattern from packages/payments/tsconfig.json (target ES2022, module ESNext, moduleResolution bundler, composite true, outDir dist, rootDir src, strict true)
Create packages/quant-economy/vitest.config.ts with basic vitest defineConfig

Create src/types.ts with all shared types/schemas: CoinTransaction, Wallet, VirtualGood, GoodCategory, InventoryItem, CreatorListing, RevenueSplit, PayoutRequest, BoostPack, BoostRequest, BoostAnalytics, AdCampaign, AdImpression, AdClick, Gift, Tip, SubscriptionTier (Free/Pro/ProPlus/Family), Entitlement, PaymentGatewayAdapter interface (with methods for createOrder, verifyPayment), RazorpayAdapter interface, StripeAdapter interface

Create src/coins/wallet.ts - CoinWallet class with: createWallet, getBalance, creditCoins, debitCoins (with insufficient balance check), getTransactionHistory. In-memory Map storage. All mutations produce CoinTransaction entries in a ledger.

Create src/coins/buy-coins.ts - BuyCoinService class with: buyWithStripe(userId, amount, paymentRef), buyWithRazorpay(userId, amount, paymentRef), buyWithUPI(userId, amount, paymentRef). Each takes a PaymentGatewayAdapter interface (no real keys). Idempotency via a Set of processed paymentRef strings.

Create src/coins/earn-coins.ts - EarnCoinService class with: claimDailyLogin(userId) (once per day per user, tracked via date string map), claimReferralBonus(referrerId, referredId) (one-time per pair), custom earn event. Configurable amounts.

Create src/coins/transaction-ledger.ts - TransactionLedger class with: record(entry with idempotencyKey), getByUser(userId), getByKey(idempotencyKey). Deduplication by idempotencyKey. Entries track: id, userId, amount, direction (credit/debit), reason, idempotencyKey, timestamp.

Create src/store/catalog.ts - VirtualGoodsCatalog class with: addItem(good), listByCategory(category), getItem(id), search(query). Categories: avatar_item, outfit, skin, chat_theme, sticker_pack, gift_item.

Create src/store/inventory.ts - CrossAppInventory class with: grantItem(userId, itemId), revokeItem(userId, itemId), getUserItems(userId), hasItem(userId, itemId). Items are usable across all apps (cross-app flag is inherent).

Create src/store/purchase.ts - StorePurchaseService class with: purchaseItem(userId, itemId, payWithCoins: boolean). Debit coins from wallet, grant item to inventory. Validates item exists and user has sufficient balance.

Create src/creator/listings.ts - CreatorListingService class with: createListing(creatorId, item details, price), updateListing, delistItem, getCreatorListings, getMarketplaceListings. Support item types: virtual_good, game_pass.

Create src/creator/revenue-split.ts - RevenueSplitEngine class with: calculateSplit(saleAmount) returns {creatorAmount, platformAmount} with 70/30 split. recordSale(creatorId, saleAmount) logs to payout ledger. getCreatorEarnings(creatorId). configurable split ratio (default 70/30).

Create src/creator/payouts.ts - CreatorPayoutService class with: requestCashOut(creatorId, amount, method), getPayoutHistory(creatorId), processPayout(payoutId). States: pending, processing, completed, failed. Validates minimum payout amount and available balance.

Create src/boost/boost-engine.ts - SelfBoostEngine class with: createBoostPack definitions (tiered: basic/standard/premium with different reach multipliers), boostPost(userId, postId, packId, payWithCoins), getBoostAnalytics(boostId). NO sponsored tag - clearly distinct from ads. Multiplier-based organic reach amplification.

Create src/boost/boost-packs.ts - BoostPackRegistry with predefined tiers: Basic (2x multiplier, 100 coins), Standard (5x, 250 coins), Premium (10x, 500 coins). Custom pack creation for monetization flexibility.

Create src/ads/campaign-manager.ts - CompanyAdManager class with: createCampaign(advertiser, budget, targetingCriteria, billingModel: CPM|CPC), pauseCampaign, resumeCampaign, getCampaignStats. Campaigns always have sponsored label. Separate from boost system.

Create src/ads/impression-tracker.ts - ImpressionClickTracker class with: recordImpression(campaignId, userId), recordClick(campaignId, userId), getCampaignMetrics(campaignId) returns {impressions, clicks, ctr, spend}. Budget enforcement - stop serving when budget exhausted.

Create src/gifting/gift-service.ts - GiftingService class with: sendGift(fromUserId, toUserId, itemId), acceptGift(giftId), getReceivedGifts(userId), getSentGifts(userId). Debit from sender wallet, credit item to recipient inventory.

Create src/gifting/tip-service.ts - TippingService class with: sendTip(fromUserId, toUserId, amount), getTipsReceived(userId), getTipsSent(userId). Debit coins from sender, credit to recipient. Preset amounts (10, 50, 100, 500 coins).

Create src/subscriptions/subscription-manager.ts - SubscriptionManager class with: subscribe(userId, tier), upgrade(userId, newTier), downgrade(userId, newTier), cancel(userId), getCurrentTier(userId). Tiers: Free, Pro, ProPlus, Family (up to 6 members). Track start date and billing cycle.

Create src/subscriptions/entitlements.ts - EntitlementService class with: checkEntitlement(userId, feature) returns boolean, getEntitlements(userId) returns feature list. Feature gates by tier: Free (basic), Pro (boost, premium themes, no ads), ProPlus (all Pro + priority support, exclusive items), Family (ProPlus for up to 6 members).
Create src/index.ts barrel exporting all public classes and types
Create src/__tests__/wallet.test.ts - Tests: create wallet, credit coins, debit coins, insufficient balance error, transaction history, concurrent operations integrity (10+ tests)
Create src/__tests__/buy-coins.test.ts - Tests: buy via stripe adapter, buy via razorpay adapter, idempotency (duplicate paymentRef rejected), buy via UPI (5+ tests)
Create src/__tests__/earn-coins.test.ts - Tests: daily login claim, double claim same day rejected, referral bonus, duplicate referral rejected (5+ tests)
Create src/__tests__/transaction-ledger.test.ts - Tests: record entry, idempotency key deduplication, get by user, ledger integrity across multiple operations (4+ tests)
Create src/__tests__/store.test.ts - Tests: add catalog item, purchase item, insufficient coins, cross-app inventory grant/check/revoke (5+ tests)
Create src/__tests__/creator.test.ts - Tests: create listing, 70/30 revenue split math (exact values), payout request, payout minimum validation, creator earnings accumulation (6+ tests)

Create src/__tests__/boost.test.ts - Tests: boost post deducts coins, boost analytics tracked, boost has NO sponsored label (explicit assertion), boost vs ad separation (verify different data models), tiered packs pricing (5+ tests)
Create src/__tests__/ads.test.ts - Tests: create campaign with sponsored label, record impressions, record clicks, CTR calculation, budget exhaustion stops serving (5+ tests)
Create src/__tests__/gifting.test.ts - Tests: send gift deducts from sender, recipient receives item, send tip deducts coins and credits recipient, preset tip amounts (4+ tests)

Create src/__tests__/subscriptions.test.ts - Tests: subscribe to tier, upgrade tier, entitlement check for Pro feature, Free user denied Pro feature, Family plan member access, cancel subscription (6+ tests)
Run pnpm install from root to link the new workspace package
Run pnpm --filter @quant/quant-economy typecheck to verify no type errors
Run pnpm --filter @quant/quant-economy test to verify all 40+ tests pass
Run pnpm --filter @quant/quant-economy lint to verify no lint errors
acceptance_criteria: packages/quant-economy/package.json exists with correct name, scripts, and dependencies
TypeScript compiles without errors (pnpm --filter @quant/quant-economy typecheck passes)
All 40+ tests pass (pnpm --filter @quant/quant-economy test shows 40+ passing)
ESLint passes (pnpm --filter @quant/quant-economy lint has no errors)
Wallet supports credit/debit with balance validation and full transaction history
Buy-coins flow uses PaymentGatewayAdapter interfaces (no real keys) with idempotency
Earn-coins has daily login (once per day) and referral bonus (once per pair)
Transaction ledger enforces idempotency via idempotencyKey deduplication
Virtual goods catalog has categories and cross-app inventory
Creator listings with 70/30 revenue split and payout cash-out flow
Self-boost engine is clearly separate from ads (no sponsored tag, uses organic reach multiplier)
Company ads have sponsored label, CPM/CPC billing, budget enforcement, impression/click tracking
Gifting deducts from sender and credits recipient; tipping works with preset amounts
